AI Quality Assurance Engineer (AI/ML QA, SDET)

About the role
We are looking for an AI Quality Assurance Engineer to own the quality of our
machine-learning powered products. You will design and build automated test
frameworks, evaluate LLM-based features, and embed quality gates across the SDLC.
You will work closely with data scientists, ML engineers, and product teams to
ship reliable, well-tested AI systems.

Responsibilities
- Design, develop, and maintain automated test suites using Python and Pytest.
- Build end-to-end and API test automation with Selenium, Playwright, and Postman.
- Create evaluation harnesses for LLM features: prompt regression, hallucination
  detection, and output-quality scoring.
- Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Docker).
- Define and track quality metrics, test coverage, and release readiness.
- Perform performance and load testing with JMeter or Locust.
- Triage defects, write clear bug reports in Jira, and drive root-cause analysis.

Required qualifications
- 4+ years of experience in software quality assurance or SDET roles.
- Strong programming skills in Python; familiarity with SQL.
- Hands-on experience with test automation frameworks (Pytest, Selenium, Playwright).
- Experience testing REST APIs and microservices.
- Solid understanding of CI/CD, Git, and containerization with Docker.
- Experience evaluating or testing machine-learning or LLM-based systems.

Nice to have
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS or GCP).
- Familiarity with MLOps tools and model monitoring.
- Knowledge of Kubernetes and observability tooling (Grafana, Prometheus).
- ISTQB certification.
